rule.statement: Service is TypeScript with strict mode; route schemas (TypeBox) generate types automatically.
rule.rationale: Schema-as-source-of-truth eliminates 'types diverge from runtime' bugs.

rule.statement: Every route has request schema (body / query / params / headers) AND response schema; routes without schemas fail PR gate.
rule.rationale: Schemas validate input + speed up serialization (fast-json-stringify) + auto-document API.

rule.statement: All plugins (helmet, cors, compress, rate-limit, auth) registered BEFORE any route; order encoded.
rule.rationale: Routes registered before plugins miss the plugin's scope; encapsulation breaks.

rule.statement: Use fastify.setErrorHandler() — never throw to default handler. Map errors to known codes; never leak stack traces.
rule.rationale: Default Fastify error formatter prints stack in dev mode; production must be deterministic.

rule.statement: On SIGINT / SIGTERM: await fastify.close() — drains in-flight + closes plugins.
rule.rationale: fastify.close() runs onClose hooks; missing them leaks DB connections.
